recommendations.title: Project A
recommendations.overview: In late 19th century Hong Kong, the British may rule the land, but the pirates rule the waters. Coast Guard officer Dragon Ma is determined that his beloved Coast Guard will not be made a fool of.

recommendations.title: Satanic
recommendations.overview: Four friends on their way to Coachella stop off in Los Angeles to tour true-crime occult sites, only to encounter a mysterious young runaway who puts them on a terrifying path to ultimate horror.

recommendations.title: Dangerous Animals
recommendations.overview: A savvy and free-spirited surfer is abducted by a shark-obsessed serial killer. Held captive on his boat, she must figure out how to escape before he carries out a ritualistic feeding to the sharks below.

recommendations.title: Superdeep
recommendations.overview: In 1984, a Russian research team goes below the surface to find out what secret the world's deepest borehole is hiding. On their expedition, something unexpectedly gruesome awaits the researchers.

recommendations.title: The Burning Sea
recommendations.overview: An oil platform dramatically goes down on the Norwegian coast, and researchers try to find out what happened when they realize this is just the start of something even more serious.

recommendations.title: Jaws
recommendations.overview: When the seaside community of Amity finds itself under attack by a dangerous great white shark, the town's chief of police, a young marine biologist, and a grizzled shark hunter embark on a desperate quest to kill the beast before it strikes again.

recommendations.title: It Came from Beneath the Sea
recommendations.overview: A giant octopus, whose feeding habits have been affected by radiation from H-Bomb tests, rises from the Mindanao Deep to terrorize the California Coast.

recommendations.title: 47 Meters Down
recommendations.overview: Two sisters on Mexican vacation are trapped in a shark observation cage at the bottom of the ocean, with oxygen running low and great whites circling nearby, they have less than an hour of air left to figure out how to get to the surface.

recommendations.title: The Transformers: The Movie
recommendations.genres: Animation, Science Fiction, Action, Adventure, Family
recommendations.overview: The Autobots must stop a colossal planet-consuming robot who goes after the Autobot Matrix of Leadership. At the same time, they must defend themselves against an all-out attack from the Decepticons.

recommendations.title: Las leyendas: El origen
recommendations.genres: Animation, Comedy, Fantasy, Adventure, Family, Horror
recommendations.overview: When a human baby crosses the Eternal Mirror, the portal between the living and the dead opens its path to the beings from the underworld.
